# Hugo Content Workflow

## When to Use
- Drafting new posts or pages for src/content/.
- Revising existing content while preserving front matter conventions.
- Performing pre-publish checks for Hugo content quality and structure.

## Procedure
1. Review a nearby content example in the same section.
2. Draft or revise content with matching front matter shape.
3. Validate taxonomy/tag/category consistency.
4. Run through the [content checklist](./references/checklist.md).

## Deliverable
- Updated content text with consistent metadata and a short QA checklist.
